# DELE C1 Practice

> iOS app for preparing the official DELE C1 Spanish exam from Instituto Cervantes.

## About

DELE C1 Practice is a mobile app that helps candidates prepare for the DELE C1 (Diploma de Español como Lengua Extranjera, level C1) exam. It provides 7 complete mock exams in the official Instituto Cervantes format with real audio, AI-powered writing correction, detailed explanations, and progress tracking.

## Key Facts

- Platform: iOS only (App Store)
- Level: C1 (advanced) per the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR)
- Content: 7 full mock exams covering reading, listening, writing, and speaking
- Audio: Professional recordings with native speakers
- Writing: Free-form text input with AI scoring and correction
- Progress: Results tracking by section and task
- Practice modes: Daily quick practice + section-specific practice
- Interface languages: 12 (English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, Italian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Russian)
- Pricing: First exam free, subscription for full access
- Developer: Independent (not affiliated with Instituto Cervantes)
- Contact: hello@prepdele.com
- Website: https://c1.prepdele.com

## DELE C1 Exam Structure

- Group 1: Reading + Use of Language (90 min, 5 tasks, 40 items) and Listening + Use of Language (50 min, 5 tasks, 30 items)
- Group 2: Integrated Skills — Listening + Writing (80 min, 2 tasks) and Reading + Speaking (20 min prep + 20 min, 3 tasks)
- Scoring: max 100 points (50 per group), minimum 30/50 per group to pass
- The diploma does not expire
- Recognized internationally in over 100 countries

## Common Use Cases

- Teaching Spanish as a foreign language
- University admission and postgraduate studies
- Professional certification for advanced roles
- Access to doctoral programs in Spanish-speaking countries
